b-o-m-conversion.description: Add or remove Unicode Byte-Order-Mark (BOM) in a text-based file. Expects: raw document. Sends back: raw document.

batch-tm-leveraging.description: Simple and fast batch leveraging step that delegates to connectors

batch-translation.description: Creates translations from an external program for a given input document. Expects: raw document. Sends back: raw document.

char-listing.description: Generate a list of all the characters in the source content of a set of documents. Expects: filter events. Sends back: filter events.

character-count.description: Count the number of characters in the text units of a set of documents or/and in its parts. Expects: filter events. Sends back: filter events.

characters-checker.description: Compare source and target for character inconsistencies. Expects: filter events. Sends back: filter events.

cleanup.description: Cleans strings by normalizing quotes, punctuation, etc. ready for further processing. Expects: filter events. Sends back: filter events.

code-simplifier.description: Merges adjacent inline codes in the source part of a text unit. Also where possible, moves leading and trailing codes of the source to the skeleton (Only for GenericSkeleton!). Expects: filter events. Sends back: filter events.

codes-removal.description: Removes inline codes from the text units content of a document. Expects: filter events. Sends back: filter events.

concordance-character-count.description: TM concordance or phrase match (usually a word or term only) Expects: filter events. Sends back: filter events.

concordance-word-count.description: TM concordance or phrase match (usually a word or term only) Expects: filter events. Sends back: filter events.

convert-segments-to-text-units.description: Convert each aligned segment pair (for all target locales) to its own complete text unit Expects: filter events. Sends back: filter events.

copy-or-move.description: Copies or moves the listed files to the specified location. Expects: raw documents. Sends back: raw documents.

create-target.description: Create target segment container. Optionally copy source content to the target. Expects: filter events. Sends back: filter events.

desegmentation.description: Joins all segments into a single content. Expects: filter events. Sends back: filter events.

diff-leverage.description: Compare two source documents (i.e., different versions) and copy the old target content when we find a match. Can be a monolingual and bi-lingual input or three monolingual inputs. Paragraphs (TextUnits) must align in all cases

encoding-conversion.description: Convert the character set encoding of a text-based file. Expects: raw document. Sends back: raw document.

enrycher.description: Applies Enrycher ITS annotations to the source content. Expects: filter events. Sends back: filter events.

exact-document-context-match-character-c.displayName: Exact Document Context Match Character Count
exact-document-context-match-character-c.description: Matches EXACT and comes from a repeated segment in the same document or a different version of the same document. See also EXACT_PREVIOUS_VERSION Expects: filter events. Sends back: filter events.

exact-document-context-match-word-count.displayName: Exact Document Context Match Word Count
exact-document-context-match-word-count.description: Matches EXACT and comes from a repeated segment in the same document or a different version of the same document. See also EXACT_PREVIOUS_VERSION Expects: filter events. Sends back: filter events.

exact-local-context-match-character-coun.displayName: Exact Local Context Match Character Count
exact-local-context-match-character-coun.description: Matches EXACT and a small number of segments before and/or after. Expects: filter events. Sends back: filter events.

exact-local-context-match-word-count.displayName: Exact Local Context Match Word Count
exact-local-context-match-word-count.description: Matches EXACT and a small number of segments before and/or after. Expects: filter events. Sends back: filter events.

exact-match-character-count.description: Matches text and codes exactly. Expects: filter events. Sends back: filter events.

exact-match-word-count.description: Matches text and codes exactly. Expects: filter events. Sends back: filter events.

exact-previous-version-match-character-c.displayName: Exact Previous Version Match Character Count
exact-previous-version-match-character-c.description: Matches EXACT and comes from the preceding version of the same document (i.e., if v4 is leveraged this match must come from v3, not v2 or v1!!). Expects: filter events. Sends back: filter events.

exact-previous-version-match-word-count.displayName: Exact Previous Version Match Word Count
exact-previous-version-match-word-count.description: Matches EXACT and comes from the preceding version of the same document (i.e., if v4 is leveraged this match must come from v3, not v2 or v1!!). Expects: filter events. Sends back: filter events.

exact-repaired-character-count.description: Matches text and codes exactly, but only after the result of some automated repair (e.g. number replacement, code repair, capitalization, punctuation etc.) Expects: filter events. Sends back: filter events.

exact-repaired-word-count.description: Matches text and codes exactly, but only after the result of some automated repair (e.g. number replacement, code repair, capitalization, punctuation etc.) Expects: filter events. Sends back: filter events.

exact-structural-match-character-count.description: Matches EXACT and the structural type of the segment (title, paragraph, list element etc.) Expects: filter events. Sends back: filter events.

exact-structural-match-word-count.description: Matches EXACT and the structural type of the segment (title, paragraph, list element etc.) Expects: filter events. Sends back: filter events.

exact-text-only-character-count.displayName: Exact Text Only Match Character Count
exact-text-only-character-count.description: Matches text exactly, but there is a difference in one or more codes. Expects: filter events. Sends back: filter events.

exact-text-only-previous-version-match-c.displayName: Exact Text Only Previous Version Match Character Count
exact-text-only-previous-version-match-c.description: Matches EXACT_TEXT_ONLY and comes from a previous version of the same document. Expects: filter events. Sends back: filter events.

exact-text-only-previous-version-match-w.displayName: Exact Text Only Previous Version Match Word Count
exact-text-only-previous-version-match-w.description: Matches EXACT_TEXT_ONLY and comes from a previous version of the same document. Expects: filter events. Sends back: filter events.

exact-text-only-unique-id-match-characte.displayName: Exact Text Only Unique Id Match Character Count
exact-text-only-unique-id-match-characte.description: Matches EXACT_TEXT_ONLY and matches a unique id. Expects: filter events. Sends back: filter events.

exact-text-only-unique-id-match-word-cou.displayName: Exact Text Only Unique Id Match Word Count
exact-text-only-unique-id-match-word-cou.description: Matches EXACT_TEXT_ONLY and matches a unique id. Expects: filter events. Sends back: filter events.

exact-text-only-word-count.displayName: Exact Text Only Match Word Count
exact-text-only-word-count.description: Matches text exactly, but there is a difference in one or more codes. Expects: filter events. Sends back: filter events.

exact-unique-id-match-character-count.displayName: Exact Unique Id Match Character Count
exact-unique-id-match-character-count.description: Matches EXACT and matches a unique id. Expects: filter events. Sends back: filter events.

exact-unique-id-match-word-count.displayName: Exact Unique Id Match Word Count
exact-unique-id-match-word-count.description: Matches EXACT and matches a unique id. Expects: filter events. Sends back: filter events.

extraction.description: Generates a Rainbow translation kit for a batch of input documents. Expects: filter events. Sends back: filter events or raw document

extraction-verification.description: Verifies a raw document can be extracted, merged, then extracted again and produces the same set of events during both extractions. Expects: raw document. Sends back: unmodified raw document.

filter-events-to-raw-document.description: Combine filter events into a full document and pass it along as a raw document. Expects: filter events. Sends back: raw document or NO_OP if writing to a stream.

filter-events-writer.description: Write out filter events into a document or stream.

format-conversion.description: Converts the output of a filter into a specified file format. Expects: filter events. Sends back: filter events.

full-width-conversion.description: Convert the text units content of a document to or from full-width characters (zenkaku). Expects: filter events. Sends back: filter events.

fuzzy-match-character-count.description: Matches both text and/or codes partially. Expects: filter events. Sends back: filter events.

fuzzy-match-word-count.description: Matches both text and/or codes partially. Expects: filter events. Sends back: filter events.

fuzzy-previous-version-match-character-c.displayName: Fuzzy Previous Version Match Character Count
fuzzy-previous-version-match-character-c.description: Matches FUZZY and comes from a previous version of the same document. Expects: filter events. Sends back: filter events.

fuzzy-previous-version-match-word-count.displayName: Fuzzy Previous Version Match Word Count
fuzzy-previous-version-match-word-count.description: Matches FUZZY and comes from a previous version of the same document. Expects: filter events. Sends back: filter events.

fuzzy-repaired-character-count.description: Matches both text and/or codes partially and some automated repair (e.g. number replacement, code repair, capitalization, punctuation etc..) was applied to the target. Expects: filter events. Sends back: filter events.

fuzzy-repaired-word-count.description: Matches both text and/or codes partially and some automated repair (e.g. number replacement, code repair, capitalization, punctuation etc..) was applied to the target. Expects: filter events. Sends back: filter events.

fuzzy-unique-id-match-character-count.displayName: Fuzzy Unique Id Match Character Count
fuzzy-unique-id-match-character-count.description: Matches FUZZY and matches a unique id. Expects: filter events. Sends back: filter events.

fuzzy-unique-id-match-word-count.displayName: Fuzzy Unique Id Match Word Count
fuzzy-unique-id-match-word-count.description: Matches FUZZY and matches a unique id. Expects: filter events. Sends back: filter events.

g-m-x-alphanumeric-only-text-unit-charac.description: An accumulation of the character count for text units that have been identified as containing only alphanumeric words. Expects: filter events. Sends back: filter events.

g-m-x-alphanumeric-only-text-unit-word-c.description: An accumulation of the word count for text units that have been identified as containing only alphanumeric words. Expects: filter events. Sends back: filter events.

g-m-x-exact-matched-character-count.description: An accumulation of the character count for text units that have been matched unambiguously with a prior translation and thus require no translator input. Expects: filter events. Sends back: filter events.

g-m-x-exact-matched-word-count.description: An accumulation of the word count for text units that have been matched unambiguously with a prior translation and thus require no translator input. Expects: filter events. Sends back: filter events.

g-m-x-fuzzy-match-character-count.description: An accumulation of the character count for text units that have been fuzzy matched against a leveraged translation memory database. Expects: filter events. Sends back: filter events.

g-m-x-fuzzy-match-word-count.description: An accumulation of the word count for text units that have been fuzzy matched against a leveraged translation memory database. Expects: filter events. Sends back: filter events.

g-m-x-leveraged-matched-character-count.description: An accumulation of the character count for text units that have been matched against a leveraged translation memory database. Expects: filter events. Sends back: filter events.

g-m-x-leveraged-matched-word-count.description: An accumulation of the word count for text units that have been matched against a leveraged translation memory database. Expects: filter events. Sends back: filter events.

g-m-x-measurement-only-text-unit-charact.description: An accumulation of the character count from measurement-only text units. Expects: filter events. Sends back: filter events.

g-m-x-measurement-only-text-unit-word-co.description: An accumulation of the word count from measurement-only text units. Expects: filter events. Sends back: filter events.

g-m-x-numeric-only-text-unit-character-c.description: An accumulation of the character count for text units that have been identified as containing only numeric words. Expects: filter events. Sends back: filter events.

g-m-x-numeric-only-text-unit-word-count.description: An accumulation of the word count for text units that have been identified as containing only numeric words. Expects: filter events. Sends back: filter events.

g-m-x-protected-character-count.description: An accumulation of the character count for text that has been marked as 'protected', or otherwise not translatable (XLIFF text enclosed in <mrk mtype="protected"> elements). Expects: filter events. Sends back: filter events.

g-m-x-protected-word-count.description: An accumulation of the word count for text that has been marked as 'protected', or otherwise not translatable (XLIFF text enclosed in <mrk mtype="protected"> elements). Expects: filter events. Sends back: filter events.

g-m-x-repetition-matched-character-count.description: An accumulation of the character count for repeating text units that have not been matched in any other form. Repetition matching is deemed to take precedence over fuzzy matching. Expects: filter events. Sends back: filter events.

g-m-x-repetition-matched-word-count.description: An accumulation of the word count for repeating text units that have not been matched in any other form. Repetition matching is deemed to take precedence over fuzzy matching. Expects: filter events. Sends back: filter events.

general-checker.description: Compare source and target for general quality. Expects: filter events. Sends back: filter events.

id-based-aligner.description: Align text units in two id-based files (e.g. Java properties). Expects: filter events. Sends back: filter events.

id-based-copy.description:
Copies the source text of the second input into the target of the first input based on matching id.
Expects: filter events. Sends back: filter events.

image-modification.description: Create a modified copy of image files. Expects: image raw document. Sends back: image raw document.

inconsistency-check.description: Checks for source entries that are the same but have different translations or target entries that are the same but have different sources. Expects: filter events. Sends back: filter events.

inline-codes-checker.description: Compare source and target for inline code differences. Expects: filter events. Sends back: filter events.

length-checker.description: Compare source and target lengths and annotate those that seem mismatched. Expects: filter events. Sends back: filter events.

leveraging.description: Leverage existing translation into the text units content of a document. Expects: filter events. Sends back: filter events.

line-break-conversion.description: Convert the type of line-breaks in a text-based file. Expects: raw document. Sends back: raw document.

localizable-checker.description: Compare source and target number, date and time patterns to assure they are localized. Expects: filter events. Sends back: filter events.

m-s-batch-translation.description: Annotates text units with Microsoft Translator matches or/and creates a TM from them. Expects: filter events. Sends back: filter events.

m-t-character-count.description: Indicates a translation coming from an MT engine. Expects: filter events. Sends back: filter events.

m-t-word-count.description: Indicates a translation coming from an MT engine. Expects: filter events. Sends back: filter events.

merging.description: Post-process a Rainbow translation kit. Expects: filter events. Sends back: filter events or raw documents.

paragraph-aligner.description: Align paragraphs (text units) between a source and a target document. Only TextUnit events are passed along - all other events are lost

patterns-checker.description: Compare source and target for pattern differences. Expects: filter events. Sends back: filter events.

phrase-assembled-character-count.description: Matches assembled from phrases in the TM or other resources (different algorithms could be used). Expects: filter events. Sends back: filter events.

phrase-assembled-word-count.description: Matches assembled from phrases in the TM or other resources (different algorithms could be used). Expects: filter events. Sends back: filter events.

post-segmentation-code-simplifier.description: Merges adjacent inline codes in the source and target part of a text unit. Also where possible, moves leading and trailing codes of the source to inter-segment TextParts. Expects: filter events. Sends back: filter events.

quality-check.description: Compare source and target for quality. Expects: filter events or raw documents. Sends back: filter events or raw document.

r-t-f-conversion.description: Remove the RTF layer from a text-based file. Expects: raw document. Sends back: raw document.

raw-document-to-filter-events.description: Convert a raw document into filter events. Expects: raw document. Sends back: filter events.

raw-document-to-output-stream.description: Write a RawDocument to an output stream.

raw-document-writer.description: Write a RawDocument to an output file.

remove-target.description: Remove targets in all or a given set of text units. Expects: filter events. Sends back: filter events.

repetition-analysis.description: Analyzes repetitions in input documents. Adds AltTranslationsAnnotation and RepetitiveSegmentAnnotation to a repetitive segment. Expects: filter events. Sends back: filter events.

resource-simplifier.description: Simplify resources. Simplification algorythm is format-specific. Expects: filter events. Sends back: filter events.

scoping-report.description: Create a template-based scoping report based on word count and leverage annotations. Expects: filter events. Sends back: filter events.

search-and-replace.description: Performs search and replace on the entire file or the text units. Expects raw document or filter events. Sends back: raw document or filter events.

segmentation.description: Apply SRX segmentation to the text units content of a document. Expects: filter events. Sends back: filter events.

sentence-aligner.description: Aligns sentences within text units (paragraphs). Produces sentence alignments as bilingual text units or a TMX file.

simple-word-count.description: Annotates each text unit source with a total word count and gives total source word counts for batches Expects: filter events. Sends back: filter events.

space-check.description: Compare and fix spaces around inline codes in target based on the source. Expects: filter events. Sends back: filter events.

t-m-import.description: Import text into a new or existing Pensieve TM. Expects: filter events. Sends back: filter events.

t-t-x-joiner.description: Rebuilds previously split TTX documents into their original documents. Expects: raw document. Sends back: raw document.

t-t-x-splitter.description: Splits a TTX document into several ones of roughly equal word count. Expects: raw document. Sends back: raw document.

term-extraction.description: Extract a list of possible terms found in the source content. Expects: filter events. Sends back: filter events.

terminology-leveraging.description: Leverage terminology into the text units content of a document. Expects: filter events. Sends back: filter events.

text-modification.description: Apply various modifications to the text units content of a document. Expects: filter events. Sends back: filter events.

tokenization.description: Extracts tokens from the text units content of a document. Expects: filter events. Sends back: filter events.

translation-comparison.description: Compare the translated text units between several documents. Expects: filter events. Sends back: filter events.

tu-filtering.description: Set the non-translatable flag to the text units accepted by the text unit filter specified in step's parameters. Expects: filter events. Sends back: filter events.

uri-conversion.description: Encodes or Decodes URI escape sequences. Expects: filter events. Sends back: filter events.

whitespace-correction.description: Correct whitespace following segment-ending punctuation when translating from  a space-delimited language (such as English) to a non-space-delimited language (Chinese or Japanese), or vice-versa. Expects: filter events. Sends back: filter events.

word-count.description: Count the number of words in the text units of a set of documents or/and in its parts. Expects: filter events. Sends back: filter events.

x-m-l-analysis.description: Generate an analysis report of a set of XML documents. Expects: raw document. Sends back: raw document.

x-m-l-char-fixing.description: Fixes invalid characters in XML documents. Expects: raw document. Sends back: raw document.

x-m-l-validation.description: Validate XML documents. Expects: raw XML document. Sends back: raw XML document.

x-s-l-transform.description: Apply an XSLT template to an XML document. Expects: raw XML document. Sends back: raw document.

xliff-joiner.description: Join multiple XLIFF documents into one. Expects: raw document. Sends back: raw document.

xliff-splitter.description: Split an XLIFF document into separate files for each <file> element. Expects: raw document. Sends back: raw document.

xliff-w-c-splitter.description: Split an XLIFF document into separate documents based on word count.Expects: raw document. Sends back: raw document.
